title: lithocarpus calolepis
intro: Lithocarpus calolepis, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a species of plant that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and promoting overall health. Lithocarpus calolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
